content.problemStatement: You are given two integers NNN and MMM. Find the number of sequences A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äã,A2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äã, where each element is an integer between 111 and MMM (inclusive) and no three consecutive elements are equal. Since this number could be very large, compute it modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and MMM.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äï the number of valid sequences modulo 109+710^9+7109+7.
